title: Quick Start Guide - Emu - First Screen, Charge Case/ Pairing 1 - zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide Charge Case screen zoom in/out functionality fails to match Figma Pairing screen on Voyager Free 60+
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap Device Settings for the connected device
On the 'Charge Case' screen, tap the blue circle button
Tap the blue circle button again
expected: 1) On first tap of the blue circle button: The earbud zooms in and the screen text matches the Figma Pairing (Option 1) screen. 2) On second tap of the blue circle button: The screen zooms out to the original view.
